about: Scruples Salon & Day Spa is a friendly and harmonious day spa and salon founded in 2003, located at 325 Hazard Avenue in Enfield, Connecticut. Under the care of proprietor Crystal Theocles, Scruples offers a comprehensive range of services designed to enhance your appearance and promote good health — from REIKI and medical-grade esthetic treatments to Swedish massage, hair styling, nails, waxing, facials, body treatments, and bridal packages. They proudly serve communities throughout Connecticut and Massachusetts, and accept gift certificates from Spafinder, Spa Week, and Spa Wish.
features: Spafinder / Spa Week / Spa Wish Accepted

giftCertificates.note: Gift cards must be presented in physical form. Spafinder/Spa Week/Spa Wish cards invalid for spa parties.

designBrief.colorDirection: deep plum, blush pink, gold accents, soft cream
designBrief.inspiration: High-end spa website. Clean whitespace, elegant serif headings, muted tones.
designBrief.avoidance: No neon colors. No clip art. No popup CTAs. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Light background, centered text, single accent color, soft gradient
designBrief.uniqueElement: Service category cards with hover reveal details
